evidence.claim: BIFMA X5.1 is the industry-standard certification for office chair durability and safety; not all chairs are tested.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Not a standardized claim. Check specific ergonomic features (4D arms, adjustable lumbar, seat depth adjust, synchro-tilt).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: What specific adjustable features does the chair have?

confabulationPatterns.reality: Mesh quality (weave density, nylon-vs-elastomer composition) varies widely. Herman Miller and Haworth grade mesh is objectively different from budget mesh that sags in 6 months.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: What mesh type and composition is cited?

counterfeitSignals.signal: Herman Miller Aeron listed >50% off from non-authorized seller

compatibilityQuestions: Body size? Some chairs (e.g. Aeron sizes A/B/C) require selection by body dimensions.
Flooring? Casters differ for carpet vs hardwood.
Hours per day seated? Premium chairs justify cost over 6+ hrs/day use.

repairability.notes: Herman Miller parts available for 12+ years. Budget chairs often have no parts market.
